title: DBManager Contract v1
description: Contract for DBManager SQL query outputs: fetch_df, fetch_scalar, and execute results.

fetch_df_result.title: fetch_df Result
fetch_df_result.description: Result of DBManager.fetch_df() — a dict with columns and rows.

rows.description: List of row tuples, one per result row.

items.description: A single row of values. Types must be JSON-compatible (null, number, string, boolean).

fetch_scalar_result.title: fetch_scalar Result
fetch_scalar_result.description: Result of DBManager.fetch_scalar() — a dict wrapping the scalar value.

value.description: The scalar value from the first column of the first row. May be null when no rows are returned.

execution_result.title: execute Result
execution_result.description: Result of DBManager.execute() — rowcount and success flag.

rowcount.description: Number of rows affected by the statement. -1 indicates unknown (e.g. DDL).

success.description: Whether the statement completed without error.
